root.name: add_and_underline_bullet_point_on_slide_6
root.description: Evaluates if the agent added the correct second bullet to slide 6 and applied underline formatting.

children.name: bullet_point_added
children.description: Checks that the correct second bullet was added to slide 6.

children.name: correct_bullet_text_added
children.description: Checks if a bullet with the exact specified text was added to slide 6.

children.name: bullet_point_underlined
children.description: Checks that the new bullet point is underlined on slide 6.

children.name: bullet_text_is_underlined
children.description: Verifies underline formatting is applied to the precise added bullet text.

children.name: no_unnecessary_changes
children.description: Checks that no unrelated changes were made outside the required bullet and underline on slide 6.

children.name: no_unrelated_slide_changes
children.description: No slides other than slide 6 have content changes.

children.name: no_animation_or_transition_changes
children.description: No animations or transitions were added, removed, or modified.

metadata.task: Add a second bullet point to slide 6: 'Determining healthy weight for children requires precise measurement tools' and underline it
